title: Cubical
description: This pack makes the circle or round textures into cube shape
body:
# Cubical

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5864693201a20a4b93315bd9d1f5d4c01d6f469d.png)

This **_Cubical Resource Pack_** makes circular items into more cube sharp edged versions. The with this pack was to make item fit in more with minecraft's cube world.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43da420442902730334abb82013e7db10b0b0a2d.png)
###  _**All the changed textures can be seen at the gallery tab**_
